channel.title: personal on Home
channel.description: Recent content in personal on Home

item.title: Kshitij's website
item.description: What this website is about # This website is about the things I do as a programmer, gamedevloper, and AI Developer (All Unofficially) Don’t want this website to be bloated, so I made it in hugo My Configs # NeoSpark My Neovim Config Qtile My Qtile Config My youtube channel # Youtube Link : Online Projects # Grid World : A simple test of basic Q learning on a grid world NEAT Algorithm Visualization : NeuroEvolution Of Augumenting Topologies Algorithm Implemented in Javascript (p5.
